article_title: Bylaw 14770 — Housing Agreement (5938 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement locks non-market rental units at 5938 Olive Avenue permanently
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14770 on November 25, 2025, binding Olive Properties Inc. to a housing agreement that restricts designated units at 5938 Olive Ave to non-market rental use under Section 483 of the Local Government Act.
briefs.action_required: Review tenant eligibility, income limits, and rent-setting obligations in the Housing Agreement before leasing non-market units.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
